data.title: Best Crypto to Buy as Top Hong Kong Investment Firm Buys More Bitcoin
data.description:
HK Asia Holdings Limited, a top investment firm in Hong Kong, is the latest to join the Bitcoin buying spree among institutions and companies. The firm purchased around 7.88 $BTC on February 20, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 8.88 $BTC. Put together, HK Asia had to shell out around $97,021 per $BTC, or $862K in total. It’s worth noting that this is the second time the firm has...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/best-crypto-to-buy-as-top-hong-kong-investment-firm-buys-more-bitcoin/

data.title: ETH Options Traders Divided Over $2800 Mark Amid High Gamma Concentration
data.description: According to PANews, Greeks.live macro researcher Adam shared insights in a Chinese community briefing, revealing a split among ETH options traders regarding the $2800 level. This division is primarily due to the high concentration of gamma at this point. Many traders believe that the performance of U.S. stock ETFs will determine the direction of a potential breakout, advising caution before market opening. Additionally, there is a strong bearish sentiment towards SOL, with expectations that it is forming a large M-top pattern and may test the $120 support level.

data.title: U.S. stocks opened, and the three major indexes rose
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. stocks opened, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.15%, the S&P 500 rose 0.28%, and the Nasdaq rose 0.3%. Tesla (TSLA.O) rose 0.5%, and it is reported that it is preparing to deploy FSD in China. Apple (AAPL.O) rose 0.2%, and it announced that it would invest more than $500 billion in the United States within four years. Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B.N) rose 0.95%, and its fourth-quarter profit hit a record high. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance will adjust the collateral ratio of ATOM and other assets
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will update the collateralization rates of ATOM, ANKR, COTI, EGLD, SUSHI, OM and other assets under PortfolioMargin at 06:00 (UTC) on February 28, 2025. The update is expected to be completed within one hour. The specific adjustments are as follows: ATOM from 85% to 75%, ANKR from 80% to 70%, COTI from 80% to 70%, EGLD from 80% to 70%, SUSHI from 75% to 60%, and OM from 20% to 10%. Users need to pay close attention to the unified maintenance margin ratio (uniMMR) to avoid potential liquidation or losses due to changes in collateralization rates. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Infini: The key information of the vulnerability has been determined and the addresses involved are being monitored
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Stablecoin digital bank Infini released an important update on the theft incident. It has identified key information about the vulnerability and is monitoring the addresses involved.

data.title: Infini founder: If hackers return funds, we are willing to provide a 20% reward and not take legal action
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Christian, founder of the stablecoin digital bank Infini, said in a post, “I know hackers may monitor my tweets, so this is my sincere message: I have tried my best to show that there are still kind and responsible people in this industry. I deeply regret my mistake and will work hard to do the right thing for my users.” “I hope there is a way to recover what we lost. I am willing to offer 20% of the stolen amount as a bounty and promise not to take legal action if the funds are returned. No matter what, I will continue to love and support this industry.”

data.title: Consumer-grade public chain Morph launches DeFi activity version 2.0: new partners and limited-time 7x points rewards
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Starting from 10 pm Beijing time on February 24, the consumer-grade public chain Morph added two new Defi liquidity pool partners, Concrete and Layer Bank, based on the original bulbaswap liquidity pool.
Currently, deploying assets into liquidity pools will significantly increase the number of Morph points a user earns compared to just holding assets on-chain, with each decentralized application (dApp) having its own multiplier: BulbaSwap - 2x; LayerBank - 2x; Concrete - 2.6x. At the same time, to celebrate the cooperation with new partners, Morph will provide higher Morph points bonuses for these liquidity pools in the first 7 days: from today, day 1 to day 7 - 7x bonus, and after day 8, return to the above standard multiples (depending on the liquidity pool and asset: 2x/2.6x).
It is reported that this Defi event is a limited-time 7x points reward event on the Morph Defi Frenzy 1.0 version. In Morph's ongoing Defi activities, users can cross-chain and deploy any eligible assets, including BGB, ETH, USDC, USDT, WBTC, pumpBTC, USDe, weETH, LBTC, MX. Different assets correspond to different bonus rates: for example, pumpBTC, weETH, LBTC - 2 times; USDe - 2.6 times, etc.
Currently, Morph points are worth over $11 on the Whales website.

data.title: Merlin Chain PoS Upgrade Prestage Staking Campaign Phase 3 Launched: Unlimited Staking Opened, APR Locked at 15%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Merlin Chain will officially start the third phase of PoS Prestage staking at 14:00 GMT today. In this phase, the upper limit of single-period staking is cancelled, and the annualized yield is anchored at 15% for a long time.
After the subsequent PoS mainnet upgrade, it will support the staking and governance voting of BTC/MBTC dual assets, and open up the liquidity of the Bitcoin ecosystem.
In addition, the PoS upgrade will further expand the number of network validators, which is conducive to further improving the decentralization and security of Merlin Chain.
